config.webEmpty: The web channel has no configurable settings. Click another channel to load its configuration.

placeholders.ids: One ID per line (comma-separated is also supported)

notices.wechatAutoLogin: When enabled with an empty bot_token, Save opens the QR dialog. If Save is disabled (already in sync), toggle auto_login or tweak any field, then Save. To scan again, clear bot_token and Save.

wechatLogin.title: WeChat QR login (iLink)
wechatLogin.hintAfterSave: Settings saved; the channel is starting. A QR code will appear below—scan with WeChat and confirm on your phone.
wechatLogin.waitBackend: Waiting for the QR code… If this takes too long, check server logs or clear bot_token and Save again.
wechatLogin.qrTextHint: No image from API; only raw QR payload is available. Use WeChat to scan per vendor flow or check server logs.
wechatLogin.qrHostedPageHint: WeChat blocks embedding this page in other sites (no iframe). Scan the QR below with WeChat, or open the link—same as the official flow.
wechatLogin.openQrInNewTab: Open scan page in new tab
wechatLogin.filledDraft: Credentials filled into the form below
wechatLogin.savePrompt: Login succeeded. Fields are filled in—click Save to persist configuration.
wechatLogin.savePromptFromFile: Credentials were loaded from the local file (not QR). Click Save to write them into config; to scan again, delete or clear the credential file first, then Save.

wechatUnbind.confirm: This deletes the local credential file (credential_file) and clears bot_token, ilink_bot_id, and ilink_user_id in config. The WeChat channel will restart. If it stays enabled with an empty bot_token, you can scan again to sign in with another account.
wechatUnbind.success: WeChat account unlinked; credential file and tokens cleared from config

placeholders.name: Enter task name
placeholders.cron: 7 fields (Quartz): second minute hour day month dow year. Ranges: second(0-59), minute(0-59), hour(0-23), day(1-31), month(1-12), dow(1-7 or ?), year(1970-2099 or *). Day and dow cannot both be specific. Examples: daily 9am='0 0 9 * * ? *'; one-shot 2026-04-29 17:30='0 30 17 29 4 ? 2026'
placeholders.cronShort: 7 fields (Quartz): second minute hour day month dow year

errors.expiredCannotEnable: Task has expired and cannot be enabled

skillNet.title: SkillNet
skillNet.noResults: No matching skills. Try different keywords.
skillNet.replaceConfirm: A skill named "{{name}}" is already installed. Continuing will uninstall the current version and replace it with the selected one. Continue?
skillNet.concurrentLimitReached: At most {{max}} skills can install at once. Wait for some to finish, then try again.
skillNet.installTimeout: SkillNet install timed out (it may still be running). Refresh the skill list later.
skillNet.usageNotice1: Installing a skill downloads files from GitHub. Ensure the machine running JiuwenSwarm can reach GitHub (network / proxy).
skillNet.usageNotice2: GitHub’s API limits anonymous (unauthenticated) use to about 60 requests per hour per IP. If install fails with rate limiting, wait and retry later. For increased rate limits, configure github_token on the <configLink>configuration page</configLink>.
skillNet.usageNotice3: SkillNet search uses a public service; timeouts or errors may be due to network congestion or server load—try again later.
skillNet.usageNotice4: If installs fail or are very slow because of GitHub latency (e.g. mainland China), use the optional download mirror URL field below.
skillNet.mirrorInvalid: Enter a valid http(s) URL or clear this field.
skillNet.evaluateModalSubtitle: Five-dimension scores are model-generated from the skill content (indicative only).

errors.evaluateNoApiKey: No API key for the chat model. Add it in settings to use SkillNet evaluation.
errors.evaluateFailedFallback: Evaluation failed. Please try again later.
errors.searchFailedFallback: Search failed. Please try again later.
errors.sessionExpired: Install session expired. Please click Install again.
errors.downloadTimeout: Download timed out (over {{seconds}}s). Please try again later. If the network is slow, check the skill list later to see if it was installed.
errors.saveConfigFailed: Install completed but saving config failed. Please refresh the page and retry.
errors.reloadRequired: Skill installed. Please refresh the page to take effect.
errors.emptyDownloadResult: SkillNet downloaded nothing (empty path). Common causes: invalid URL or no files under that path; or GitHub listed files but every raw.githubusercontent.com fetch failed (timeouts, firewall, API reachable but raw blocked, etc.).{{hint}}
errors.skillMdNotFound: Download incomplete or missing SKILL.md. Please retry.
errors.parseSkillFailed: Could not parse the downloaded skill file.
errors.invalidMirrorUrl: mirror_url is not a valid http(s) URL.
errors.githubNotFound: This skill's GitHub source is no longer available (404 Not Found). The repository, file, or branch may have been deleted, moved, or renamed — SkillNet's listing is likely out of date, so it can't be installed right now.
errors.githubRateLimited: GitHub request was rate-limited or forbidden (403). Anonymous requests are capped (~60/hour). Please try again later, or add a github_token on the settings page for a higher limit.
errors.githubUnauthorized: GitHub authentication failed (401). Please check that github_token on the settings page is valid.
errors.githubNetwork: Failed to reach GitHub (network timeout, or still failing after retries). Please check your network/proxy and try again.
errors.githubApiError: GitHub returned an error ({{status}}): {{message}}. Please try again later.
